siteMetadata.title: SuperCoolNeato
siteMetadata.description: a few of my favorite things

nodes.excerpt: This past summer, I took a SkyWarn weather spotter class that spun me into researching one of my favorite topics all over again. In Texas, where my grade school was destroyed in the Fort Worth tornado of 2000, I grew up learning about clouds and how to identify when conditions became dangerous. Tim…

I've not been listening so much to music lately. Listening to the city and reading has recently replaced music time. I don't believe this will be permanent, but instead of contributing recent albums I've been into, I offer you a few of my favorite articles. Some of these are fairly old that I've…

Fall has a quality that makes me look way back into the past, so I've been revisiting some of the tunes of my youth. Some of it is a little, um, dark. Trainspotting Soundtrack 1 and 2 Lost Highway Soundtrack Rage Against the Machine - Rage Against the Machine
